passive.name: Contempt for the Weak
passive.description: Zed's basic attacks against low health targets deals bonus Magic Damage. This effect can only occur once every few seconds against the same enemy champion.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Zed}} basic attacks against targets {{as|below half health}} will deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to a portion of {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: This effect cannot recur on the same {{tip|champion}} for a period.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Zed's''' [[basic attack]]s against targets {{as|below 50% '''maximum''' health}} are empowered to deal {{as|{{pp|key=%|6 to 10 for 3|1;7;17}} of the target's '''maximum''' health}} as {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
wiki_detail.description2: Against {{tip|monsters}}, ''Contempt for the Weak'' deals 200% damage, capped at 300.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Contempt for the Weak'' cannot occur on the same {{tip|champion}} more than once every few seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The enhanced attack applies other [[on-hit effect]]s and can {{tip|critical strike|critically strike}} as normal (the bonus damage cannot).
* ''Contempt for the Weak'' is not consumed when {{tip|dodged}} or {{tip|blind|missed}}, but it is consumed when {{tip|blocked}}.
* ''Contempt for the Weak'' considers the target's health upon landing the attack, not when it's declared.
** If the target falls below the threshold while '''Zed''' is winding up the attack, ''Contempt for the Weak'' applies, and vice versa.
* The empowered attack will not trigger against [[structures]].

Q.name: Razor Shuriken
Q.description:
Zed and his shadows throw their shurikens.

Each shuriken deals damage to every enemy hit.
Q.tooltip: Zed and his Shadows throw their shurikens, each dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage to the first enemy they pass through, and {{ passthroughdamage }} physical damage to each additional enemy.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zed}} throws a shuriken in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zed''' throws a shuriken in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, reduced to 60% against targets beyond the first.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|80 to 240}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Reduced Damage|{{ap|80*0.6 to 240*0.6}} {{as|(+ {{ap|100*0.6}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Shurikens'' blocked by {{tip|spell shield}} still count as being hit for the reduced pass-through damage.
* If '''Zed''' buffers an attack command during ''Razor Shuriken's'' cast time the attack will perform slower than if '''Zed''' had attacked after the cast time.
** The same does not happen if '''Zed''' recasts {{ai|Living Shadow 2|Zed|Living Shadow}} during ''Razor Shuriken's'' cast time.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Living Shadow
W.description:
Passive: Zed gains energy whenever he and his shadows strike an enemy with the same ability. Energy can only be gained once per cast ability.

Active: Zed's shadow dashes forward, remaining in place for a few seconds. Reactivating Living Shadow will cause Zed to switch positions with this shadow.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Zed gains {{ e3 }} Energy whenever he and his Shadows strike an enemy with the same Ability.

Active: Zed's Shadow dashes forward, remaining in place for {{ e5 }} seconds. Recasting this Ability will cause Zed to switch positions with this Shadow.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} Whenever {{ci|Zed}} and his [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadows'' hit an ability on the same target, he restores {{sti|{{as|energy}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zed''' sends a [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadow'' to the target location that will remain for a few seconds, being able to mimic his ''{{ai|Razor Shuriken|Zed}}'' and ''{{ai|Shadow Slash|Zed}}''. ''Living Shadow'' can be recast while within range of the ''Shadow''.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Zed''' and the [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadow'' {{tip|blink}} to swap places.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Zed''' restores {{sti|{{as|energy}}}} whenever he and his [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadows'' or multiple ''Shadows'' hit an ability on the same target. This may only occur once per cast ability.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zed''' creates a [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' that dashes to the target location and remains there for {{fd|5.25}} seconds, being able to mimic ''{{ai|Razor Shuriken|Zed}}'' and ''{{ai|Shadow Slash|Zed}}'' regardless of range. ''Living Shadow'' can be recast while within range of the ''Shadow''.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Zed''' and the [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' {{tip|blink}} to swap places. If ''Living Shadow'' was recast while the ''Shadow'' is dashing, the recast will instead occur once it has been placed.
wiki_detail.description4: ''If an ability is cast while the Shadow is dashing, it will cast that ability once it has been placed. See [[Zed/LoL#Pets|Pets]] for more details about Shadows. Living Shadow will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''

E.name: Shadow Slash
E.description: Zed and his Shadows slash, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by a Shadow's slash are slowed.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zed}} slashes to deal {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies hit. Enemies hit by a [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadow's'' slash are also briefly {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: ''{{ai|Living Shadow|Zed|Living Shadow's}}'' cooldown is {{sti|cdr|reduced}} for each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit by '''Zed's''' slash.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zed''' slashes to deal {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.description2: Enemies hit by a [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow's'' slash are {{tip|slow|slowed}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds, with multiple slashes dealing no additional damage but the slow's effectiveness being increased by 50%.
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Living Shadow|Zed|Living Shadow's}}'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by 3 seconds for each enemy {{tip|champion}} hit by '''Zed's''' slash.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shield}} will only block one ''Shadow Slash'' even if two hit at the same time, the {{tip|slow}} will not apply regardless.
* ''Shadow Slash'' does not interrupt attack, movement, or cast commands.

R.name: Death Mark
R.description: Zed becomes untargetable and dashes to an enemy champion, marking them. After 3 seconds the mark triggers, repeating a portion of all the damage Zed dealt to the target while they were marked.
R.tooltip:
Zed becomes Untargetable and dashes to an enemy champion, marking them. After {{ rdeathmarkduration }} seconds, the mark triggers, dealing {{ rcalculateddamage }} physical damage and repeating {{ rdamageamp*100 }}% of all damage dealt to the target by Zed while the mark was active.

The dash leaves a Shadow behind for {{ rshadowdurationdisplayed }} seconds. Zed can Recast this Ability to switch positions with this Shadow.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Zed}} becomes {{tip|untargetable}} while {{tip|dash|dashing}} to the target enemy champion, then marks them ''Marked for Death'' for a short time. He leaves behind a [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadow'' that will remain for a period and mimic ''{{ai|Razor Shuriken|Zed}}'' and ''{{ai|Shadow Slash|Zed}}''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: ''Death Mark'' can be recast while the [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadow'' remains.
wiki_detail.blurb3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Zed''' and his [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border]] ''Shadow'' {{tip|blink}} to swap places.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Marked for Death:}} After the duration, the mark detonates to deal {{as|physical damage}} based on the total damage dealt by '''Zed''' and his [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadows'' beforehand.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Zed''' becomes {{tip|untargetable}} and, after {{fd|0.6}} seconds, he {{tip|dashes}} 125 units through the target enemy champion over {{fd|0.35}} seconds. Afterwards, he becomes targetable again, renders the target ''Marked for Death'' for 3 seconds, and gains {{tip|ghost|ghosting}} for the same duration.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Zed''' also spawns a [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' at his casting position for 9 seconds which is able to mimic ''{{ai|Razor Shuriken|Zed}}'' and ''{{ai|Shadow Slash|Zed}}'' regardless of range. ''Death Mark'' can be recast after {{fd|0.5}} seconds of his reappearance while the [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' is active, though not in the last {{fd|1.25}} seconds of its duration.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Marked for Death:}} '''Zed''' stores a portion of all {{tt|pre-mitigation|Damage calculated before modifiers}} {{as|physical damage}} and {{as|magic damage}} he and his [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadows'' deal to the target, detonating at the end of the duration to deal {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Zed''' and the [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' {{tip|blink}} to swap places.
wiki_detail.description5: ''If the target dies or is 1950 or more units away before the dash begins, Death Mark is cancelled, causing the ability to go on a {{sti|cd|{{fd|0.5}}-second}} cooldown, '''Zed''' to reappear at the cast location, and the [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] Shadow he spawned to disappear.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Zed''' gains a buff for {{fd|7.5}} seconds that indicates and determines the duration in which he may recast ''Death Mark''.
** The buff is granted on-cast and lingers for {{fd|0.25}} seconds after it expires.
* The [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' is spawned the moment ''Death Mark'' is cast.
* '''Zed''' will track the target if they change locations.
** He will dash through the target's previous location while still applying the {{as|mark|buzzword}} if they are 2200 or more units away.
* '''Zed''' will be ordered to basic attack his target after reappearing.
* ''Death Mark's'' stored damage derives from all [[basic attack]]s, [[Champion ability|abilities]], [[item]]s, [[Runes Reforged|runes]] and [[buff]]s.
* ''Death Mark's'' [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadow'' is functionally the same as a regular one, but it lasts longer and can be swapped to regardless of range.
** The range at which it mimics '''Zed's''' abilities does not change.
* The {{as|mark|buzzword}} can be prevented by becoming {{tip|untargetable}} before it is applied (untargetability after application will not prevent the mark's detonation).
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} will only block the {{as|mark's|buzzword}} application. They will not prevent '''Zed''' from initiating the cast nor block the detonation from a {{as|mark|buzzword}} that is already applied.
* If '''Zed''' dies during ''Death Mark'', the ability will cancel instantly and he will reappear at his current location. The cooldown is not compensated.
** If he enters {{tip|resurrection}} before the dash, ''Death Mark'' does not cancel. If he enters it while dashing, the dash is interrupted.
* If the {{tip|dash}} is interrupted, '''Zed''' stops, places himself to the ground (ends all displacements affecting him, but does not remove {{tip|airborne}} effects), and reappears prematurely at his current location. The {{as|mark|buzzword}} will still be applied regardless.
** '''Zed''' will remove {{tip|airborne}} effects from himself immediately upon starting the dash.
* Once '''Zed''' begins the {{tip|dash}}, two [[File:Zed's Shadow.png|20px|border|link=]] ''Shadows'' will also appear to be dashing through his target, each one spawning a certain distance behind the target (from the right and left). These ''shadows'' do '''not''' mimic abilities and disappear immediately after they stop dashing but they grant {{tip|sight}} of their surroundings.
** These ''shadows'' have a tracking distance of 2200 and a dash speed of 1750.
* ''Death Mark'' does not cancel if the target enters a {{tip|zombie state}} before the dash begins.
* If the {{as|mark's|buzzword}} {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after modifiers}} is higher than the target's '''current''' health, a ''spinning shuriken'' will appear above the victim. This does not necessarily mean the target will die, as it does not consider {{tip|shield|shields}} or forms of [[damage modifier]]s that are not respected by this predictive calculation.
{{clr}}
[[File:Spinning_Shuriken_Indicator.png|thumb|center|225px|The indicator shown in-game ''(base skin)''.]]
{{clr}}
